description: Secure the 'HR' user account by implementing a strict security profile and a custom password complexity policy. Create a password verification function named 'STRICT_PASS_VERIFY' in the SYSTEM schema that enforces a minimum length of 8 characters, at least one numeric character, and ensures the password does not contain the username. Create a profile named 'SECURE_DEV_PROFILE' with SESSIONS_PER_USER set to 2, IDLE_TIME to 15 minutes, FAILED_LOGIN_ATTEMPTS to 3, PASSWORD_LOCK_TIME to 1 day, PASSWORD_LIFE_TIME to 90 days, and PASSWORD_VERIFY_FUNCTION set to STRICT_PASS_VERIFY. Assign this profile to the 'HR' user. Demonstrate the policy by changing the 'HR' user's password to 'Oracle_2026' and generating failed login attempts until the account is locked. Use the credentials SYSTEM/OraclePassword123 for administrative actions.
